name: bisector
purpose: Automated regression hunting: drives git bisect with an automated oracle (default: verify) in an isolated worktree, and returns the culprit commit plus its gitwhy context (author, date, message, PR/issue refs) in one JSON result. The main checkout is never touched.
reach_for_me_when: a test passes at an old commit and fails now, and you need the exact commit that broke it
you would otherwise hand-script a git bisect run oracle for this incident
you want the culprit commit AND its story (author, PR/issue) in one call

commands.name: run
commands.summary: Bisect good..bad with an oracle; return the culprit commit + context
